TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sipaadih, title = sipaadih, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sipaadih} }

S.FORM: (sapaazih/sapaadih, 拿給某人看) u sapaazih nu maku tu saydang kina nisulitan. .
S.PHON: (sapaaziħ/sapaadiħ, *****) u sapaaziħ nu maku tu sajdaŋ kina nisur~ɾitan. .
S.FORM: (sapaazih/sapaadih, 拿給某人看) u sapaazih nu maku tu saydang kina nisulitan. .
S.PHON: (sapaaziħ/sapaadiħ, *****) u sapaaziħ nu maku tu sajdaŋ kina nisur~ɾitan. .
